expected.note: Phase 4.4-B reliability patch: relaxed from ["Atlas", "Consulting"] to ["Atlas"] only. Atlas can legitimately accept the turn and (per the Phase 3.3 handoff design) hand off mid-turn to another specialist; in that case the visible stream is `🌐 Nexus — handoff accepted\nAtlas identified that this is better handled by ...` (preserves the `Atlas` persona marker but drops the `Consulting` domain marker because the target specialist's domain is what gets streamed next). The route + initial agent are still strictly validated via `agentSlug:"consulting"` and `agentName:"Atlas"`, and the forbidden-leakage check is unchanged. Voice-hold still requires `Atlas` to appear on every turn.
